answers: Art history studies how visual art has evolved across cultures and time periods — from cave paintings to Renaissance masterpieces to modern abstract art. It reveals how society, politics, and technology shaped creativity.
Art history holo art er itihas — ancient cave painting theke Renaissance, Impressionism, Cubism, Pop Art shob period study kora hoy. Art diye society r culture bujha jay.

Major art movements include Renaissance (rebirth of classical art), Impressionism (light & color focus by Monet), Cubism (Picasso's geometric forms), Surrealism (Dali's dreamscapes), and Pop Art (Warhol's commercial imagery).

Famous paintings include the Mona Lisa (da Vinci), Starry Night (Van Gogh), The Persistence of Memory (Dali), Girl with a Pearl Earring (Vermeer), and The Scream (Munch). Each represents a pivotal moment in art.
